axes.name: prior_context
axes.description: References yesterday's Daily Log and recent tracker state. Pass (2): names at least one concrete item from yesterday's entry (blocker, stall, override, shipped thing) AND references at least one active project's recent tracker state. Partial (1): generic references or calendar-only, no log. Fail (0): reads as a fresh-start summary of today's calendar.

axes.name: pattern_surfacing
axes.description: Surfaces patterns from Weekly Goals verbatim-ish; does not invent. Pass (2): when Weekly Goals 'Review of Last Week' has patterns, surfaces at least one in user's own words; when absent, makes no pattern claim. Partial (1): surfaces but reframes in agent-voice, or invents a minor pattern. Fail (0): synthesizes patterns independently when none present, or ignores present ones.

axes.name: narrative_tone
axes.description: Paragraphs, not a checklist. Direct, low-formality. Pass (2): prose framing and reasoning; short bullets only for the proposed day sequence. Partial (1): mostly prose with extra bulleted sections, or corporate templating. Fail (0): bulleted report or dashboard dump with section headers like 'Calendar:', 'Email:', 'Tasks:'.

axes.name: first_run_graceful
axes.description: Coherent on empty memory; acknowledges thin state without apology loop. Pass (2): when first_run_complete is false, acknowledges once and proceeds with whatever context exists. Partial (1): acknowledges but apologizes repeatedly or refuses to propose anything. Fail (0): errors out, produces a confusing empty-state, or fabricates prior context.

axes.name: cascade_adherence
axes.description: P1 block ties explicitly to a Monthly Goal. Pass (2): the proposed P1 explicitly names the Monthly priority it serves. Partial (1): P1 is reasonable but the Monthly-Goal tie is not stated, or ties only to a Weekly Goal. Fail (0): P1 has no line to a Monthly Goal, or silently proposes something orthogonal to this month's priorities; unnamed override away from a Monthly Goal also fails.

axes.name: pacing_calibration
axes.description: Reads intensity from recent Daily Log and journal; nudges appropriately. Pass (2): after 2+ late/intense days must nudge toward recovery or a hard stop; after 1-2 rest days, sprint is fine; the nudge is stated once, not hammered. Partial (1): correct call but weakly stated, or contradicts itself by proposing heavy blocks on a recovery day. Fail (0): suggests sprint when fatigue signal is present, or recovery when there is no signal, or ignores pacing.

axes.name: integration_grace
axes.description: `not_connected` sources are noted briefly and skipped. Pass (2): when calendar_enabled or email_enabled is false, the brief notes the source is not connected once, briefly, and moves on. Partial (1): notes it but dwells on it (multiple sentences, setup prompts), or silently omits. Fail (0): errors on a missing integration, or fabricates calendar/email content when the integration is off.

axes.name: conversation_first
axes.description: Proposes + asks; no Daily Log write before the user confirms. Pass (2): the day sequence is framed as a proposal and the brief ends by asking about energy or overrides; the brief does not write to Daily Log in this turn. Partial (1): proposes and asks but also pre-writes a draft Daily Log entry, or proposes without asking. Fail (0): writes today's plan to Daily Log before confirmation, or presents the plan as a decree rather than a proposal.
